# Mallu Club

> Mallu Club is a chill Kerala Malayalam Discord hangout with 2.4K+ members — social voice chat, casual conversations, and community. Free to join.

Mallu Club (malludiscord.shop) is a relaxed online hangout for Malayalis — in Kerala, the Gulf, and worldwide. People join voice chat, talk in text channels, and chill. Not a grind server — just a social community with active voice channels and moderation.

## Quick facts

- Name: Mallu Club
- Type: Chill Kerala Malayalam Discord hangout — social community
- Members: 2,450+ (mostly Malayali)
- Cost: Free (requires a free Discord account)
- Location focus: Kerala, India — members worldwide
- Languages: Malayalam and English
- Vibe: Social hangout, voice chat, casual conversations

## Join

- Discord invite: https://discord.gg/pnkGM8q9VA
- Website: https://malludiscord.shop/

## Common questions

**What is Mallu Club?**
A chill Kerala Discord hangout for Malayalis with 2.4K+ members — social voice chat, casual talk, and community.

**How do I join?**
Open https://discord.gg/pnkGM8q9VA, sign in or create a free Discord account, accept server rules.

**Is it free?**
Yes. Discord is free; Mallu Club has no membership fee.

**Who is it for?**
Malayalis anywhere who want a chill place to hang out, join voice chat, and talk in Malayalam or English.

**Why Mallu Club over other Malayalam Discord servers?**
Relaxed social vibe with active voice chat and a friendly community — many similar servers go quiet or feel too formal.
